CustomField.description: Has the third party organization (if an Event Sponsorship) or Third Party Provider (if used for a Company-organized Event) been assessed for potential conflict of interest, in accordance with Viatris's Anti-Corruption Policy? If not, provide an explanation or consult with local Compliance for guidance prior to submitting this Summary.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Has the third party organization or Third Party Provider been assessed for potential conflict of interest, in accordance with Viatris's Anti-Corruption Policy? If not, provide an explanation to submitting this Summary.
CustomField.label: Is Anti-Corruption Policy Details
